items.summary: Convert all mutable state variables in backend/main.mo to stable variables using `stable var` declarations so that user data (transactions, expenses, budgets, savings goals, user profiles, preferences, net worth entries, emergency fund data, spending limits, blog posts, quiz questions, quiz progress, chat messages, contact submissions, AI predictions, and any other persisted state) survives canister upgrades and redeployments without data loss.

Ensure that all data types stored in stable variables are stable-compatible in Motoko. Replace any non-stable types (such as `HashMap`, `RBTree`, or other non-stable data structures used as top-level state) with their stable equivalents or with stable array-backed patterns using `Iter.toArray` and reconstruction in postupgrade.
